# Auto-generated from requirements-lock.txt. Pylzss/lzfse excluded —
# they require C compilation on Python 3.13+ and PhoneTransfer never
# uses IPSW handling. Pillow-heif excluded — optional HEIC conversion.
#
# Used by setup-deps.bat after direct deps are installed --no-deps.
# Manual users: pip install -r requirements-safe.txt
